headline: Is Ulta Beauty's Expanded Therabody Rollout (ULTA) Quietly Redefining Its Wellness-Led Growth Story?
summary: Therabody recently announced a major expansion of its partnership with Ulta Beauty, rolling out its wellness and skincare technology products to more than 1,000 Ulta locations and Ulta.com after starting in over 300 stores in fall 2025. This move deepens Ulta Beauty's Wellness by Ulta Beauty offering, reinforcing its push into self-care devices that can attract new customers and broaden in-store and online baskets. We’ll now examine how Therabody’s wider rollout across more than 1,000 Ulta...

headline: Ulta Beauty CEO: GLP-1 effects on hair, skin could boost demand for beauty products
summary: Ulta Beauty CEO highlights a key trend impacting the business of cosmetics.

headline: Ulta CEO reveals GLP-1 Impact on beauty demands
summary: Ulta CEO, Kecia Steelman, sits down with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor, Brian Sozzi on the Opening Bid Unfiltered podcast to discuss how the rise of GLP-1 weight loss drugs is driving demand for hair loss and skin elasticity products, while also highlighting a broader shift toward aging gracefully and the return of bold, ‘80s-inspired color cosmetics in beauty trends

headline: 'Hair Loss With GLP-1s Is Real,' Ulta CEO Says As Weight Loss Drug Trend Boosts Hair, Skincare Sales
summary: Ulta Beauty sees rising demand as GLP-1 weight-loss drug users seek hair and skincare solutions for thinning hair and reduced skin elasticity.
